title: LLMStreamEnvelope
description: Typed broker-local model stream response envelope carrying canonical request digest linkage and ordered LLMStreamEvent objects.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for broker-local LLM stream envelope wrappers.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this broker-local LLM stream envelope wrapper.

run_id.description: Run identifier whose trusted policy context governed this model stream.

request_digest.description: Canonical digest for the LLMRequest object that opened this stream.

events.description: Ordered stream events emitted for one canonical model request.
